summary: Completed e2e testing of Notifications and OCR Document Scanner features for TravelCRM. All backend API tests passed (18/18). All frontend UI tests passed - notification bell, notification panel, dismiss functionality, and document scanner zones in all required locations.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding aria-describedby to DialogContent components for better accessibility
seed_data_creation: Demo data reset via POST /api/demo/reset - includes 5 passengers with passport expiry dates at 25, 55, 80 days, and trips starting in 5 days
context_for_next_testing_agent: All notification and OCR features are working correctly. Backend tests cover: GET /api/notifications (returns passport expiry and trip alerts sorted by severity), POST /api/notifications/dismiss/{id} (removes notification from list), POST /api/ocr/scan (accepts image upload and returns extracted data via GPT-4o). Frontend tests verified: notification bell with badge count, notification panel opens with alerts, dismiss button removes notifications, document scanner zone appears in New Passenger dialog, Edit Passenger dialog, and Documents tab.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/notifications - PASSED - returns notifications for passport expiry (30/60/90 days) and upcoming trips (7 days)
POST /api/notifications/dismiss/{notification_id} - PASSED - dismisses notification and removes from list
POST /api/ocr/scan - PASSED - accepts image upload and returns extracted passport/ID data via GPT-4o
POST /api/ocr/scan-and-create - PASSED - same as scan but for creating new passengers
frontend_components: NotificationBell in sidebar - PASSED - shows badge with notification count
Notification panel - PASSED - opens and shows all alerts sorted by severity
Dismiss notification (X button) - PASSED - removes notification from list
DocumentScanner in New Passenger dialog - PASSED - zone visible with camera icon and instructions
DocumentScanner in Edit Passenger dialog - PASSED - zone visible at top of form
DocumentScanner in Documents tab - PASSED - zone visible with 'Escanear documento con IA' section
